questions.text: Subjects like Defense, Foreign Affairs, and Banking are part of the:
questions.explanation: The Union List includes subjects of national importance which require a uniform policy across the country.

questions.text: Which level of government has the power to legislate on 'Residuary' subjects?
questions.explanation: According to the Indian Constitution, the Union Government has the power to legislate on subjects not mentioned in any of the three lists.

questions.text: What was the main purpose of the constitutional amendment in 1992?
options: To make the three-tier democracy more powerful and effective
questions.explanation: The 1992 amendment decentralized power to local government bodies (Panchayats and Municipalities).

questions.text: A system of government in which power is divided between a central authority and various constituent units is called:
questions.explanation: Federalism involves at least two levels of government, each with its own jurisdiction.

questions.text: Which of the following is an example of 'Coming Together' federation?
questions.explanation: In 'Coming Together' federations like the USA, Switzerland, and Australia, independent states come together on their own to form a bigger unit.
